assertions.description: INCORRECT: The TCR2EF33 LDO VOUT pin connects to an unnamed internal net (the junction between VOUT, C2, and FB1 pin 1). The named '+3V3' power rail is on the other side of FB1. The analyzer correctly identifies the LDO topology and estimates Vout=3.3V from the part suffix, but reports output_rail as '__unnamed_0' in power_regulators. The design_observations also flag a missing output cap because C2 is on the unnamed net, not on '+3V3'. In reality C2 is the output decoupling cap — just separated from the '+3V3' label by the ferrite bead. The analyzer should trace through ferrite beads to associate the output rail with the named net.
